englishDefinitions: To leave a place suddenly and move away, often by packing up and starting over somewhere else.
persianTranslation: یک‌دفعه بار و بندیل را جمع کردن و رفتن
examples: After losing his job, he picked up sticks and moved to another city.
They decided to pick up sticks and start a new life abroad.
It takes courage to pick up sticks and leave everything familiar behind.
